overview: MedAlert AI is a full-stack medicine monitoring system that uses OCR scanning to read medicine labels, track expiry dates, and alert users when medicines are about to expire or have already expired. Features include a comprehensive dashboard with analytics, medicine management with CRUD operations, barcode scanning, PDF report generation, role-based access control, and English/Telugu language support — all built with a sleek dark theme designed for healthcare use.
features: OCR label scanning with Tesseract.js for extracting medicine name and expiry date
Expiry detection with color-coded status badges (Safe, Near Expiry, Expired)
Dashboard with summary cards, Recharts visualizations, and activity feed
Medicine CRUD with search, filter, and sort
In-app and browser notifications for expired/near-expiry medicines
Authentication with protected routes and role-based access (Admin/User)
Sidebar navigation with dark theme and responsive design
